elaborations.synthesis_summary: Archive replaces pruning; state.json minimal between workflows; async archive after control returns to user; best-effort failure handling; compact archive format; enforcer detection logic needs rework

Archive format: indexed-array in state-archive.json; multi-key index (source_id + slug) for O(1) lookup; appendToArchive() and lookupArchive() functions in common.cjs; enforcer owns write path; orchestrator reads directly; fail-open contract on all archive ops

6 user journeys documented; lookupArchive() deferred; MVP pruning silent (CON-003); migration seeds archive via seedArchiveFromHistory(); abandoned recovery via FR-013; /isdlc cancel already flows through enforcer (no special handling); 3 archive paths (completed+cancelled via enforcer, abandoned via init); optional reason field for cancelled workflows; outcome field: merged|completed|cancelled|abandoned
